activities_projects.title: Counting with Sticks
steps: Place one stick for each object counted
Count up to 10 using sticks
Write the numbers represented

activities_projects.title: Tally Mark Activity
steps: Write numbers from 1 to 20
Represent each number using tally marks
Check the correctness of tally groups

activities_projects.title: Roman Numeral Writing
steps: Write Roman numerals for numbers from 1 to 20
Practice writing numbers like 25, 30 and 40
Check the answers with the textbook

activities_projects.title: Number System Timeline
steps: Draw a timeline on chart paper
Add early number systems like tally marks and Roman numerals
Include the Hindu-Arabic number system

activities_projects.title: Body Counting Activity
steps: Count numbers using fingers
Write the numbers counted
Discuss how people used body parts for counting

activities_projects.title: Roman Numeral Match
steps: Write numbers from 1 to 15 in one column
Write Roman numerals in another column
Match them correctly

activities_projects.title: Number Representation Chart
steps: Choose five numbers
Represent them using tally marks
Represent the same numbers in Roman numerals

activities_projects.title: Create Your Own Number System
activities_projects.objective: Understand the idea of number systems
steps: Create symbols for numbers from 1 to 10
Use the symbols to represent larger numbers
Explain how your system works

activities_projects.title: Roman Numeral Practice
steps: Write Roman numerals like X, XV, XX and XXX
Convert them into Hindu-Arabic numbers
Check answers with the teacher

activities_projects.title: Number Story Writing
steps: Write a short story about how ancient people counted objects
Include examples like sticks or tally marks
Share the story with classmates
